name: Almond Macaroons/Low Calorie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. In a deep bowl, beat egg whites on low speed of an electric mixer until frothy. Beat on high speed until stiff. Gradually beat in sugar and then almond extract. Fold in wheat germ. Drop mixture by 1/2 teaspoonsful onto a cookie sheet that has been sprayed with a nonstick cooking spray and dusted lightly with flour. Put the cookies in the oven and immediately reduce the temperature to 200°F. Bake for 1 hour. Turn off heat, and leave cookies in the oven to cool. Makes 10 servings, 5 cookies each. Each cookie contains 30 calories and is 6.9% fat.
